reviews.comment:
Exelente servicio llegamos. A chosma a las 4 de la mañana. Y no sabíamos dónde ir y con un hambre tremendo hasta que encontramos la estación abierta. 24hs genial!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! We arrived in Chosma at 4 AM. We didn't know where to go and we were starving until we found the station open. 24 hours, fantastic!!!
